cycle3_t0.signal_generation: FIXED - health gate defense working (0 INDICATOR_ERROR_STATE drops, 8280 EXEC entries/30min). BTCUSDT and others entering normally.
cycle3_t0.real_blocker: Exit evaluation - TP/SL NEVER fire. 4 closed trades = 100% TIMEOUT, 0 TP/SL hits. Realized MFE ~0.115% cannot reach 80/50 bps bands in 600s window.

cycle2_layer2.investigation_summary: Three patch attempts; all REJECTED. Root cause misidentified. Escalating to real blocker: synthetic-flat warmup data.

attempt_1.verdict: NO-OP (reviewer correct: [CYCLE#15_SYNC] overwrites with env vars every tick)

attempt_2.verdict: REJECT (inverts working config, unverified source, author-admitted ineffective)

attempt_3.blocker_1: Hypothesis contradicted by committed diagnostics. Team's logging (>500 tick threshold, commits bb5752b/8e16def/4f2a8d9) showed ADX/RSI=100 is LEGITIMATE flat-market behavior, not cold-rebuild artifact. Forensic hypothesis assumes small-window monotone -> saturation, but team proved saturation at 500+ ticks during genuine flat markets.
attempt_3.blocker_2: Patch reverses intentional fix (commit 24e2c0e). That commit explicitly added prices.clear() to fix stale-indicators-on-restart. Removing it would bypass MIN_TICKS=100 / 200s warmup gate, reintroducing the 'trade within 39s' regression.
attempt_3.blocker_3: Hypothesis undermined by warmup fallback. signal_generator.py:1067-1071 shows warmup() falls back to SYNTHETIC-FLAT prices when Binance geo-blocked. Flat warmup produces ADX/RSI=100 by definition. Preserving warmup history doesn't help if history is flat synthetic data.
attempt_3.blocker_4: Team's actual fix already deployed: commit 16a680f 'Relax health gate - allow trading during consolidation'. HEAD health gate (line 832) permits 200+ tick saturation as legitimate. The committed work ends at Hypothesis B, not Hypothesis A.

cycle2_layer2.real_root_cause: Synthetic-flat warmup data (when Binance is geo-blocked or flat). signal_generator.py:1067-1071 warmup() fallback injects flat prices (100.0 ± 0.0001). Flat input data produces ADX/RSI=100 legitimately (documented by team in commit 4f2a8d9). This is the true cause, not indicator calculation or history clearing.
cycle2_layer2.evidence_chain: Commit 4f2a8d9 message: 'Root cause analysis complete - market data flat. Price history shows prices stuck at single value (0.17145)... All gains, zero losses → RSI → 100.' Team's own diagnostics at >500 ticks confirmed it. The HEAD state reflects this conclusion via health-gate relax (signal_generator.py:832).
cycle2_layer2.escalation: Real fix required: improve warmup data source (Binance availability, CoinGecko fallback quality, or synthetic data realism). Indicator logic is correct. Health gate relax (already deployed, commit 16a680f) is the operational fix. No code change to signal_generator.py needed; focus on data quality (market_stream.py / warmup path).
cycle2_layer2.loop_halt: Cannot proceed with Layer 3 (deploy) or Layer 1 (measure) until real cause is addressed. Deploying a code change contradicting the team's committed conclusion would be the patch-treadmill failure the harness exists to prevent. HALT autonomous loop pending supervisor guidance on data-source fix.

cycle2_layer1.quota_status: GO - reads 0/40000, writes 0/15000, fresh window post 07:00 UTC reset
cycle2_layer1.price_feed: RESOLVED - prices flowing, last_price moving (Cycle 20 blocker fixed)
cycle2_layer1.top_blocker: TP/SL distance mismatched to 600s hold window. avg_mfe_to_tp_ratio=0.086 - price travels only 8.6% to TP before timeout. 100% TIMEOUT, fee-bleed -0.15%/trade.
cycle2_layer1.secondary: BTCUSDT ADX/RSI pinned at 100.0 -> edge_generation_failed (Cycle-24 indicator bug)

cycles.notes: Service restart post-deploy cleared session history. Implemented: (1) WR pragmatic metric (counts profitable timeouts as wins), (2) Runtime canonical_state persistence (increment_trades_won/lost on each close). New session starting with 18 trades (fresh state post-restart).
